mnemonics: PRINT: Please Remember Input Needs Text (or commas to separate items)
INPUT: Information Neatly Provided Under Test (waits for user keyboard entry)
keyPoints: The print() function outputs text to the console
Variables and strings can be combined in print() using commas
The input() function pauses the program and captures user keyboard entry
commonMistakes: Forgetting parentheses in print() or input() statements (Python 3)
Not assigning the result of input() to a variable, losing the user's input
Forgetting to add a space or punctuation when printing multiple items with commas
